# Ekselera

> Ekselera is a Malta-based company that turns unstructured information — documents, images, video and scattered records — into reliable information organisations can act on with confidence. Its flagship product is Ziffa, document automation for Maltese accounting firms and Corporate Service Providers (CSPs).

Ekselera Ventures is the company. Ziffa is its flagship product. The base is Malta.

## What Ekselera does
- Reads unstructured data of any kind — documents, images, video, scanned paper, scattered records; any format, any channel.
- Extracts the information that actually matters and checks it is correct.
- Delivers reliable, decision-grade information inside the systems an organisation already uses — no migration, a layer on top, not a replacement.
- The differentiator: most tools digitise data; Ekselera makes it trustworthy enough to act on. "Most tools give you data. We give you decisions you can trust."

## Who it is for
Sectors where being wrong is expensive:
- Government & public bodies — applications and case files vetted and processed for faster, more consistent decisions.
- Logistics & shipping — bills of lading, customs paperwork, manifests read and reconciled with an audit trail.
- Legal & notarial — contracts, deeds and due-diligence packs; the clauses, dates and facts surfaced.
- Aviation — manifests, load plans, ULD and maintenance records turned into live operational data.
- Manufacturing — work orders, job cards, machine logs and supplier reports turned into clear operational information.
- Real estate — listings, lease expiries, permits and location data turned into first-mover signals.
- Accounting firms & CSPs — served by the flagship product, Ziffa.

## Flagship product: Ziffa
- Ziffa (https://ziffa.io/) is document automation for Maltese accounting firms and CSPs.
- It collects, checks and files client documents into the firm's own SharePoint or Google Drive.
- It understands 140+ Maltese document types and is live across hundreds of client entities.

## Company facts
- Legal entity: Ekselera Ventures. Based in Malta, European Union. VAT MT32680130.
- Founders: Andrew Cassar Overend (Founder & CEO — former Chief Economist at Malta's Ministry of Finance; former Head of Investments at Malta's National Development and Social Fund; MSc Economics, Durham) and Daniel Micallef (Co-founder & CTO — full-stack engineer, 10+ years across fintech, gaming and edge AI).
- Category: AI document & data automation, intelligent document processing.

## Links
- Website: https://ekselera.com/
- Product: https://ziffa.io/
- Contact: info@ekselera.com
